name: Thai Dumplings with Dipping Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the garlic, ginger, and chili paste for 1 minute.
2. Add the onions and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add zucchini and bell pepper and cook until the veggies are tender (3-4 minutes).
4. Add lime juice and cilantro. Remove heat and allow to cool. Coarsely chop in a food processor.
5. Place about 1 tablespoon of filling in the center of each won-ton wrapper.
6. Brush the corners with a little water, then gather the sides together and pinch to make a pouch.
7. Steam the dumplings in a lightly oiled steamer until tender (about 15 minutes).
8. Serve immediately with the dipping sauce.
Dipping Sauce:
Mix all ingredients and set aside.
